evidence.ifc_tool_result: No placement issues were retrievable; no NaN/Inf/cycle was reported by tools (but upstream outputs were null).

checks.notes: Marked pass only because no circular/NaN/Inf placements were reported; however, the null tool outputs mean this is low-confidence.

issues.fix_hint: Re-run storey/space containment inspection and ensure tool returns actual JSON outputs (storey count, elevations, and IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure mapping).
Ensure there are exactly 8 IfcSpace and exactly 4 contained in each of the 2 IfcBuildingStorey via IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure.
Give each IfcSpace a closed solid representation (e.g., swept solid) and ensure computed net floor area is > 0.
Ensure space boundary loops are closed and non-self-intersecting in plan; avoid invalid/self-intersecting solids.
Place Level 2 IfcSpace geometry fully above Level 2 storey elevation and prevent any single IfcSpace solid from spanning both storeys.
Model roof as a true gable: two main planar faces with opposite slopes meeting at a straight ridge; ensure faces are not horizontal.
Center the ridge over the footprint: ridge midpoint should be within 10% of max footprint dimension from footprint centroid in plan.
Ensure external walls form a closed loop around Level 1 spaces; wall endpoints should connect with gaps <= 20 mm (0.02 m).
Ensure wall/slab/roof representations are volumetric solids with non-zero thickness so computed volume > 0 for each element.
